assertionResults.title: Delete article — invalid ID
assertionResults.reason: Both invalid delete attempts returned 404 Not Found and did not modify the namespaced article records.

steps.expected: 404 or redirect with no DB modification
404 or redirect with no DB modification

steps.action: Compare namespaced DB rows before/after invalid deletes
steps.observed: Articles 24/25 remained present; attachment count for article 24 unchanged during this check

assertionResults.title: Upload attachment on article edit
assertionResults.reason: Uploading a valid .txt attachment on the edit form created attachment rows and files on disk, and the edit UI displayed the new attachments table rows.

steps.expected: Attachment upload succeeds and appears on edit form
steps.observed: Attachment row(s) displayed with delete action on the form

steps.expected: Attachment record(s) exist and uploaded file(s) exist in uploads/24
steps.observed: attachments table contains rows for article 24 and files are present in app/uploads/24

assertionResults.title: Upload with invalid file type
assertionResults.reason: Disallowed .exe upload was rejected with visible error text, HTTP 400 from API, and no .exe DB row or filesystem artifact.

steps.observed: Form alert/toast text: File type '.exe' is not allowed

steps.expected: No invalid attachment record or file stored
steps.observed: DB .exe count is 0 and uploads/24 has 0 .exe files

assertionResults.title: Tag-based related articles
assertionResults.reason: No user-visible related-articles surface exists in this build (article route resolves to 404 page and no related-articles API route is available).

steps.action: Create two articles sharing tag rerun-articles-shared-1773941394
steps.expected: Data exists to evaluate related-article behavior
steps.observed: Articles 24 and 25 share the same tag

steps.expected: Article detail surface where related content could be viewed
steps.observed: Rendered 404 page ('Page not found'); no related section

steps.expected: Endpoint/function output listing related articles excluding self

frictions.description: agent-browser network export lists requests but omits HTTP status/body details needed for assertion-level API response proof.
frictions.resolution: Captured supplemental authenticated curl responses in evidence text files for precise status/body validation.

blockers.description: Missing user-visible related-articles surface for tag-based relation validation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Created two shared-tag articles (24, 25), opened the expected public article route, and probed likely related endpoints; public route showed 404 UI and related endpoints returned 404.

summary: Reran 4 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-ART-041, VAL-ART-051, VAL-ART-054) and 1 blocked (VAL-TAG-003) due to missing related-articles user surface/API in this build.
